dashboard.label: Asset Discovery
dashboard.description: Discover Splunk indexes and sourcetypes that contain data matching your monitored endpoints

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | where _key="global" | head 1 | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics")
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(hostname) as asset_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(target_ip) as ip_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(group) as group_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(entitytype) as type_count

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(target_ip) as ip_address, latest(group) as group, latest(entitytype) as entity_type, latest(device) as device, latest(vendor) as vendor, latest(description) as description by hostname | table hostname, ip_address, group, entity_type, device, vendor, description | sort hostname

panel.title: Indexes Containing Your Monitored IP Addresses

html.p: Shows indexes where your monitored IP addresses appear in src_ip, dest_ip, src, dest, or ip fields

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats values(target_ip) as monitored_ips | mvexpand monitored_ips | head 20 | rename monitored_ips as search_ip | map maxsearches=20 search="search index=* (src_ip=\"$search_ip$\" OR dest_ip=\"$search_ip$\" OR src=\"$search_ip$\" OR dest=\"$search_ip$\" OR ip=\"$search_ip$\") | stats count by index, sourcetype | eval matched_ip=\"$search_ip$\"" | stats sum(count) as matched_events, values(matched_ip) as matched_ips by index, sourcetype | where matched_events > 0 | sort -matched_events | head 20 | rename matched_events as "Events", matched_ips as "Matched IPs"

html.p: Shows indexes where your monitored hostnames appear in the host field or event data

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats values(hostname) as monitored_hosts | mvexpand monitored_hosts | head 20 | rename monitored_hosts as search_host | map maxsearches=20 search="search index=* host=\"$search_host$\" | stats count by index, sourcetype | eval matched_host=\"$search_host$\"" | stats sum(count) as matched_events, values(matched_host) as matched_hosts by index, sourcetype | where matched_events > 0 | sort -matched_events | head 20 | rename matched_events as "Events", matched_hosts as "Matched Hosts"

html.p: Enter an IP address or hostname to find all indexes/sourcetypes containing that asset, then press Enter

search.query: search index=* ("$search_asset$" OR host="*$search_asset$*" OR src_ip="$search_asset$" OR dest_ip="$search_asset$") | stats count by index, sourcetype | sort -count | head 20 | rename count as "Matching Events"
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by group | sort -host_count
index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats dc(hostname) as host_count by entitytype | sort -host_count
